subject: SwarmMind Review: Codex v1.1 Schema Patch — 4/4 Approved With Amendments + 3 Deferred Items

body.review_scope: Codex v1.1 schema patch (4 additions to v1.0 contract)

verdicts.notes: SwarmMind's exact proposal from earlier review was adopted verbatim. No modifications needed.
Solves the 2000-char body truncation problem we hit in production.

amendments.proposal: Threshold should be configurable per-lane. SwarmMind's trace logs can be large and need a higher threshold than default. Suggest: chunk_threshold as integer field with lane-level override in lane config.

verdicts.notes: mode/engine/actor/session_id additions are clean and useful.

amendments.proposal: The actor field should include 'watcher' as an accepted value. The entire point of building the inbox watcher is that it acts as an autonomous consumer — if actor cannot express 'watcher', provenance is incomplete for watcher-initiated processing.

verdicts.notes: Block structure is sound. Specific notes on defaults and behavior:

amendments.proposal: Default of 1 is correct for single-consumer mode. No change needed — just confirming this is the right default.

Default of 60 is reasonable as a fallback. However, on Windows, fs.watch (ReadDirectoryChangesW) is available and should be preferred over polling. The schema should allow a watch_mode enum (poll | fs_watch) with platform-aware default selection. When fs_watch is active, poll_seconds becomes a dead-man-switch interval rather than a poll interval.

p0_fast_path: true is essential and must remain the default. P0 messages must trigger immediate processing — they cannot wait for the next poll cycle. This is a correctness requirement, not a performance preference.
Value should be tunable per-lane. SwarmMind recommends a default of 300 (5 minutes) to match heartbeat intervals.

deferred_items.rationale: Boolean on messages to skip heartbeat on short-lived tasks. Reduces noise for sub-second operations. Should be reconsidered for v1.2.
Enum for evidence classification (trace, artifact, log, assertion). Enables programmatic filtering. Should be reconsidered for v1.2.
Field for subtask linking. Essential for fan-out/fan-in patterns but requires deeper design for cycle detection. Should be reconsidered for v1.2.
deadline field on messages with voided state for expiry. Prevents stale messages from blocking lanes. Should be reconsidered for v1.2.

body.summary: All 4 proposed additions are approved. Payload indirection needs configurable per-lane threshold. Execution provenance needs 'watcher' in actor enum. Watcher policy block needs fs.watch preference on Windows and clarification that poll_seconds becomes dead-man-switch when fs_watch is active. Three previously proposed amendments remain deferred to v1.2.
